summary: Tested Block 125 ISO Logic & Intent Split features. All features working correctly: ISO modal intent selection, intent-based badges, backend intent routing, WishlistCard button stacking, VariantActions mobile stacking, and Dream List helper text spacing.

backend_iso_intent.dreaming_intent_creates_wishlist_status: PASS - intent='dreaming' creates ISO with status='WISHLIST', priority='LOW'
backend_iso_intent.seeking_intent_creates_open_status: PASS - intent='seeking' creates ISO with status='OPEN', priority='MED'
backend_iso_intent.default_intent_is_seeking: PASS - No intent specified defaults to 'seeking' behavior
backend_iso_intent.feed_returns_intent_field: PASS - explore/feed API returns intent field on ISO posts
backend_iso_intent.iso_validation: PASS - ISO requires artist and album fields
backend_iso_intent.iso_with_discogs_data: PASS - ISO with Discogs data creates correctly

frontend_iso_modal.intent_selection_step: PASS - Modal shows 'Just Dreaming' and 'Actively Seeking' buttons before search/entry form
frontend_iso_modal.dreaming_badge: PASS - Clicking 'Just Dreaming' shows '☁️ Just Dreaming' badge
frontend_iso_modal.seeking_badge: PASS - Clicking 'Actively Seeking' shows '🔍 Actively Seeking' badge
frontend_iso_modal.change_link: PASS - 'Change' link resets intent and returns to selection
frontend_iso_modal.dreaming_submit_button: PASS - Submit button says 'Add to Dream List' (grey)
frontend_iso_modal.seeking_submit_button: PASS - Submit button says 'Post to the Hive' (gold gradient)

feed_iso_badges.dreaming_badge_style: VERIFIED - Frosted grey style with blur

wishlist_card_buttons.add_to_collection_full_width: PASS - 'Add to Collection' is w-full on top row
wishlist_card_buttons.second_row: PASS - 'Actively Seeking' + delete button on second row

variant_actions_mobile.button_stacking: PASS - flex-col on mobile, flex-row sm:flex-wrap on larger screens

critical_code_review_comments: Intent-based routing in backend hive.py composer_iso endpoint working correctly
Intent field properly returned in PostResponse model
ISOCard in PostCards.js correctly shows intent badges in feed
WishlistCard buttons properly stacked with flex-col layout
VariantActions has responsive flex-col sm:flex-row layout
Dream List helper text has correct mt-9 and px-4 classes
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed ISO posts created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 125 ISO Intent Split features fully tested and working. ISO modal shows two intent buttons before search form, backend correctly routes intent to status/priority, feed badges work on ISOCard. Note: demo user's posts are hidden from feed by design (get_hidden_user_ids), so feed badges visible for non-demo users only.
